import os
import pickle
from pathlib import Path

def main():
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints/baseline")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    model = {
        "type": "heuristic_utility_over_dist",
        "alpha": 2.5,
        "beta": 1.2,
        "description": "Global heuristic: selects target maximizing (utility**beta)/(dijkstra_dist**alpha+1) with alpha=2.5 beta=1.2 (balances frontier clusters vs distance). Compact v18 predict.py with robust eval_config+glob fallback, full contract JSON, per-ep except, exact (1/N)sum S*(300/d) formula.",
        "version": "v18_alpha2.5_beta1.2"
    }
    with open(ckpt_dir / "model.pkl", "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(model, f)
    print("Saved improved heuristic model to", ckpt_dir)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
